gauge.name: Little Snake River near Savery

impacts.statement: Many areas in the town of Baggs will be under water.  Water reaches the base of the County Road 607 bridge.

Major flooding occurs in many areas in the town of Baggs. Access to the County Road 607 bridge is blocked by high water.  Major lowland flooding occurs from Savery to Baggs.  Flood wave travel time to Baggs is approximately 5 to 6 hours.

Major lowland flooding occurs downstream in the town of Baggs.  Standing water reaches along County Road 607 approaching the bridge.  Access to the bridge may become impassable.  Moderate to major lowland flooding develops from Savery to Baggs.  Flood wave travel time to Baggs is approximately 5 to 6 hours.

Flood stage.  Water enters low lying areas along County Road 607 approaching the bridge.  Standing water along low lying areas along the left and right river banks.  Moderate lowland flooding occurs in the town of Baggs.  Minor lowland agricultural flooding continues to become more widespread from Savery to Baggs.

Low lying flooding intensifies and becomes more widespread downstream in the town of Baggs.  Flood wave travel time to Baggs is approximately 5 to 6 hours.  Minor lowland agricultural flooding becomes more widespread from Savery to Baggs.

Bankfull stage.  Water flows over low lying areas along the right and left river banks.  Minor flooding expected dwonstream in the town of Baggs.  Peak flow travel time to Baggs is approximately 5 to 6 hours.  The river may come out of its banks from Savery to Baggs.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
